headline: Is Axon (AXON) Quietly Recasting Its AI Governance To Reshape Its Public Safety Platform?
summary: Axon Enterprise recently expanded its board, appointing former Dell executive Vivek Mohindra and AI entrepreneur Eiso Kant as independent directors on July 8, 2026, with Mohindra joining the Audit and Compensation Committees and Kant observing the M&A and Capital Structure Committee. This board refresh brings together deep enterprise strategy and cutting-edge AI infrastructure expertise, potentially influencing how Axon develops and governs its evolving public safety technology...
